sonnet-baseline.description: Same prompt but Sonnet -- tests if cheaper model is good enough

sonnet-v2.description: assess-v2 on Sonnet -- cost/accuracy vs opus-v2 (old v1 data: sonnet 53/61 ~= opus 54/61, so promising)

sonnet-v1.description: assess-v1 single-claim on Sonnet -- is the cheap model fine on the simpler prompt? (old v1 data: sonnet 53/61 ~ opus 54/61)

opus-v2-api.description: assess-v2 via the direct Messages API (opinion inlined, no agent harness) -- cost-audit F1 validation arm; must match the pinned opus-v2 baselines (withers >=16/19 yellows, <=4 green over-flags, 3/3 reds; A/B >=55/61)

sonnet-v1-api.description: assess-v1 single-claim on a PINNED current Sonnet via the API -- cost-audit F2 prerequisite re-run (the 2026-06-13 sonnet-v1 arm ran the unpinned CLI alias)
